level_signals: 6+ years of experience in strategy, operations, monetization, or ads
Single-threaded owner for critical monetization problems
End-to-end ownership of ambiguous, high-impact problems

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 6+ years of experience in strategy, operations, monetization, or ads (e.g., marketplace, pricing, growth, or ad tech)
Experience working cross-functionally with Product, Engineering, and Data Science teams
A proven track record of owning ambiguous, high-impact problems end-to-end
Strong analytical and structured problem-solving skills (SQL preferred)
Ability to operate at both a strategic level and dive deep into data and execution

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience with pricing, monetization systems, or marketplace dynamics (preferred)

scope.surface: Ads & Promotions Monetization platform — pricing/bidding systems, global ads platform scaling
scope.business_model: B2B advertising (advertisers reaching DoorDash consumers); e-commerce and ad tech intersection
core_responsibilities: Design and evolve pricing and bidding mechanisms
Build frameworks that unify ads and promotions into a cohesive ecosystem
Develop scalable pricing systems (e.g., dynamic pricing, reserve pricing, experimentation frameworks)
Partner with Product and Data Science to define models, inputs, and success metrics
Drive adoption and performance of monetization features across advertisers
Define how our ads platform scales across global markets
Establish standardized frameworks across pricing, formats, inventory, and user experience
Build systems that balance global consistency with local flexibility
Partner with Product and Engineering to scale solutions across regions
Develop playbooks to support international expansion and long-term platform growth
Own key business metrics and deliver against revenue, efficiency, and experience goals
Drive initiatives end-to-end from problem definition through launch and iteration
Develop data-driven insights and business cases to inform product strategy and prioritization

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed ($136K–$200K national base) with equity mentioned
Clear product surface with two well-defined focus areas (pricing/monetization and global platform scaling)
High-visibility role with direct revenue impact
DoorDash is a large, scaled platform with meaningful ads business growth trajectory
red_flags: Work location and remote/hybrid policy not stated anywhere in the JD — unclear where this role is based
SQL listed as 'preferred' but included in a hard-requirement bullet — classification is ambiguous
Role scope described as potentially covering one or both focus areas, leaving actual day-to-day ambiguous until hire
No mention of team size or reporting structure
